title: Setting a date when a board is first created

posts.author: RichardT (Richard )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi
We are going to be creating project boards from a template using an automation on another board.

When the project board is first created we need to set a date column to the date the board was created. Is there anyway to do this in an automation or do we manually need to set the date?

Thanks in advance

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @RichardT !

Unfortunately since you will be using a template, you would need to manually set the date of the creation.

You could however use the Creation Log column, which would show when each item is created ( subsequently the items created with the boards creation would have the boards creation date ).

Let me know if this works ok for you.

Best Regards,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
